name: stackshot
description: Generate image prompts for repository tech stack cards.

interface.shortDescription: Generate tech stack card prompts from repositories.
interface.longDescription: StackShot scans a repository for framework, language, tooling, file, LOC, test, and style signals, then produces a polished 1200x630 image-generation prompt for a developer tech stack card.
defaultPrompt: Generate a StackShot card prompt for this repo.
Create a dark glass tech stack card prompt.
Scan this project and make a StackShot prompt.
